name: Minecraft RAD3
short_desc: Roguelike Adventures and Dungeons 3 modded Minecraft server.
author: JimScope
description: Modded Minecraft server running the Roguelike Adventures and Dungeons 3 (RAD3) CurseForge modpack via itzg/minecraft-server. Auto-downloads the modpack on first boot.

form_fields.label: CurseForge API Key
form_fields.hint: Get a free key at console.curseforge.com -> API Keys. Required to download the modpack.

form_fields.label: Memory
form_fields.hint: RAM allocated to the server, e.g. 6144M or 8G.

form_fields.label: MOTD
form_fields.hint: Message shown in the server list.

form_fields.label: Operators
form_fields.hint: Admin usernames, comma-separated. Leave empty to set later.

form_fields.label: Whitelist
form_fields.hint: Allowed usernames, comma-separated. Leave empty to set later.

form_fields.label: Enforce whitelist
form_fields.hint: Only whitelisted players can join. Enable only after filling the whitelist, or nobody can connect.
